zh.lifeSummary: Humfrey Ball於1523年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦。他和Dorothy Beasley至少有1個女兒。他去世於1602年在英國英格蘭多瑟特享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Humfrey Ball于1523年出生在英国英格兰倫敦。他和Dorothy Beasley至少有1个女儿。他去世于1602年在英国英格兰多瑟特享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ball
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English bal, ball(e) ‘ball, sphere, globe, round body’ (Old French balle or Old English beall(a)), a nickname for a short, obese person.
English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a knoll or rounded hill, from the same Middle English word, bal(le) as in 1 above, but applied topographically.
English: from a Middle English adjective ball (weak form balle) in the sense ‘bald’, from ball ‘white streak, bald place’.

variants.name: Baller
meanings: English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English bal, ball(e) ‘ball, sphere’, perhaps denoting a ball maker.
English: variant of Ball 2 for someone who lived at a knoll, from a derivative of Middle English bal, ball(e) ‘knoll, rounded hill’, the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant.
German: from a variant of the ancient Germanic personal name Balther (from bald ‘bold, strong’).

variants.name: Bald
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Inge, Karl-Heinz, Konrad, Kurt, Otto.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo, or a short form of various compound names such as Baldwin , formed with the first element bald ‘bold, strong’.

Scottish and English: from the Norman personal name Bald(e), Baud(e), occasionally Bold, a short form of the common ancient Germanic personal names Baldwin or Baldric, or possibly a survival of Old English Beald (compare Balding ); the relevant element in each of these is b(e)ald ‘brave’. As a hereditary surname it seems to have died out in England but survives in Scotland.

variants.name: Balle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Corina, Elidoro, Fernando, Geraldo, Humberto, Joaquin, Ruben.

variants.name: Balls
meanings: English (Norfolk, Suffolk, and Essex): variant of Ball , with excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Humfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

variants.name: Humphry
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: Humfrey Ball was born in 1523, in London, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter with Dorothy Beasley. He died in 1602, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Humfrey Ball est né en 1523, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Dorothy Beasley. Il est décédé en 1602, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Humfrey Ball wurde 1523 in London, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Dorothy Beasley mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1602 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Humfrey Ball è nato il nel 1523 nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Dorothy Beasley. Morì nel 1602, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Humfrey Ball(은)는 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났다. 그는 Dorothy Beasley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1602년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Humfrey Ball nasceu em 1523, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Dorothy Beasley. Ele faleceu em 1602, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Humfrey Ball родился в 1523 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Dorothy Beasley. Он умер в 1602 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.
